text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi
Date: Wed Sep  9 19:51:24 UTC 2015
New revision: 396530
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/396530

Log:
  devel/visualparadigm: 12.0.20150401 -> 12.2.20150902

  Changes:
  - Use of sqlitejdbc
  - Use of Oracle's jdk. It no longer works with OpenJDK and the
    upstream project indicated that they won't make changes to make
    it work with it either.

  PR:		202752
  Submitted by:	Fernando Apesteguia <fernando.apesteguia@gmail.com> (maintainer)

  head/devel/visualparadigm/distinfo
